title: uncrafting inventory
description: What would happen if the recipes that you craft were reversed?
body:
# El inventario se descraftea

<hr>

## 📖 Descripcion

Pasado un tiempo corto aleatorio (el cual se pude configurar), se descrafteara un item de tu inventario

Nota: Se te devolveran items para volver a craftearlo pero no nesesariamente los mismos que usaste para craftearlo

## 📖 Description

After a short random time (which can be configured), an item will be uncrafted from your inventory.

Note: You will be given back items to re-craft but not necessarily the same items you used to craft it.


## ⌨️ Commands/Comandos

Modificar tiempo minimo y maximo / Modify minimum and maximum time
```mcfunction
/data modify storage vbc:102 t set value {min:<minimum time> ,max:<maximum time>}
```

<hr>
